commit.message: use checked_cast, undo MIN2, update the test

added check for compiler_buffer_size>SIZE_MAX case.
message updated - CICompilerCount is too large: compiler buffer size exceeds the CodeCache size limit
adding regression test: check VM output with -XX:CICompilerCount=100M
compiler_buffer_size: use uint64 for calculation; limit CICompilerCount
8379396: "assert(offset + partition_size <= size()) failed: partition failed" when combining NonProfiledCodeHeapSize and large value for CICompilerCount
